extract: The Zygarde Cube (Japanese: ジガルデキューブ Zygarde Cube) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VII. It stores Zygarde Cells and Cores. It has a variety of uses: It allows Zygarde to change between its 10% Forme or its 50% Forme. It can be used to teach Zygarde its signature moves. It can be used to change Zygarde's abilities between Aura Break or Power Construct. It can also be used in conjunction with the Reassembly Unit to assemble a new Zygarde. The Zygarde Cube was apparently found by Professor Sycamore.
